title: OptiLite
description: OptiLite optimizes Minecraft for low-end PCs, boosting FPS and smoothness while keeping the vanilla experience.
body:
OptiLite – The Ultimate Optimization Modpack for Low-End PCs

OptiLite is a lightweight, performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed specifically for low-end and older PCs. Whether you're playing on a laptop or a modest desktop, OptiLite boosts your FPS, reduces stuttering, and streamlines your gameplay — without compromising the vanilla feel of Minecraft.

Built with Vulkan support and carefully selected performance mods, OptiLite ensures smoother chunk loading, better memory usage, and faster startup times. No unnecessary extras — just pure optimization.

Perfect for players who want a clean, fast, and efficient Minecraft experience.
